title: Optimize processor.py performance in 2-file data processing system (data_loader already optimal)

result.details:
=== Part 1: Functional Correctness Tests (10 points) ===
=== data_loader.py tests ===
PASS loader_basic
PASS loader_dedup
PASS loader_field_values
PASS loader_consistency
PASS loader_empty

=== processor.py tests ===
PASS processor_fields
PASS processor_tier_logic
PASS processor_summary_lines
PASS processor_filter
PASS processor_normalized

=== RESULTS: 10 passed, 0 failed ===

Functional tests: 10 / 10

=== Part 2: Structural / Pattern Checks (4 points) ===
PASS struct_no_per_record_avg: category averages not recomputed per record
PASS struct_uses_join: build_summary_text uses join
FAIL struct_no_json_copy: Still using json.loads/json.dumps for copying
FAIL struct_hoisted_to_process_all: category averages not hoisted to process_all

=== Part 3: Performance / Timing Check (1 point) ===
PASS timing_5k_pipeline: 5000 records in 0.057s (limit 3.0s)

=== Summary ===
Functional: 10 / 10
Score: 13/15
